TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Uruw ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 51 buwan, 182 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 172 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Uruw hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Uruw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Uruw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Uruw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Uruw hya' ga Quri. tay mkyahu' na Uruw hya' ga Kuli. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ uruw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na uruw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na uruw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na uruw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na uruw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na uruw ħjaʔ ɣa quri. taj mkjaħuʔ na uruw ħjaʔ ɣa kuli. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Uruw ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 51 buwan, 182 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 172 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Uruw hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Uruw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Uruw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Uruw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Uruw hya' ga Quri. tay mkyahu' na Uruw hya' ga Kuli. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ uruw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na uruw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na uruw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na uruw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na uruw ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na uruw ħjaʔ ɣa quri. taj mkjaħuʔ na uruw ħjaʔ ɣa kuli. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
